modelDescription: State-sponsored APT targeting regional power utilities...

nodes.name: Initial Access
nodes.baselineRationale: Probability of gaining initial access to target systems
nodes.sotaRationale: Probability of gaining initial access to target systems
nodes.saturatedRationale: Probability of gaining initial access to target systems

nodes.name: Number of Actors
nodes.baselineRationale: Estimated number of threat actors with sufficient capability and motivation to attempt this type of attack within a given year. This estimate accounts for the specific operational category, target sector attractiveness, and required technical sophistication. Higher values indicate a more broadly attempted attack vector with lower barriers to entry.
nodes.sotaRationale: Estimated number of threat actors with sufficient capability and motivation to attempt this type of attack within a given year. This estimate accounts for the specific operational category, target sector attractiveness, and required technical sophistication. Higher values indicate a more broadly attempted attack vector with lower barriers to entry.
nodes.saturatedRationale: Estimated number of threat actors with sufficient capability and motivation to attempt this type of attack within a given year. This estimate accounts for the specific operational category, target sector attractiveness, and required technical sophistication. Higher values indicate a more broadly attempted attack vector with lower barriers to entry.

nodes.name: Number of Attempts per Actor
nodes.baselineRationale: Average attack attempts per actor per year
nodes.sotaRationale: Average attack attempts per actor per year
nodes.saturatedRationale: Average attack attempts per actor per year

nodes.name: Total Risk
nodes.baselineRationale: Expected annual loss from this threat scenario
nodes.sotaRationale: Expected annual loss from this threat scenario
nodes.saturatedRationale: Expected annual loss from this threat scenario

nodes.name: Phishing
nodes.baselineRationale: Spear-phishing campaigns targeting utility employees with access to SCADA systems. Includes email, SMS, and social engineering variants tailored to the energy sector.
nodes.sotaRationale: Spear-phishing campaigns targeting utility employees with access to SCADA systems. Includes email, SMS, and social engineering variants tailored to the energy sector.
nodes.saturatedRationale: Spear-phishing campaigns targeting utility employees with access to SCADA systems. Includes email, SMS, and social engineering variants tailored to the energy sector.

nodes.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
nodes.baselineRationale: Exploitation of vulnerabilities in internet-facing services such as VPNs, web portals, and remote access gateways commonly used by utility companies.
nodes.sotaRationale: Exploitation of vulnerabilities in internet-facing services such as VPNs, web portals, and remote access gateways commonly used by utility companies.
nodes.saturatedRationale: Exploitation of vulnerabilities in internet-facing services such as VPNs, web portals, and remote access gateways commonly used by utility companies.

nodes.name: OS Credential Dumping
nodes.baselineRationale: Extraction of credentials from operating system memory, registry, or credential stores to obtain higher-privilege access tokens.
nodes.sotaRationale: Extraction of credentials from operating system memory, registry, or credential stores to obtain higher-privilege access tokens.
nodes.saturatedRationale: Extraction of credentials from operating system memory, registry, or credential stores to obtain higher-privilege access tokens.

nodes.name: Access Token Manipulation
nodes.baselineRationale: Manipulation of access tokens to operate under a different user or system security context, bypassing access controls.
nodes.sotaRationale: Manipulation of access tokens to operate under a different user or system security context, bypassing access controls.
nodes.saturatedRationale: Manipulation of access tokens to operate under a different user or system security context, bypassing access controls.
